definitions.text: element i stekeovn som steker mat raskt ved sterk varmestråling
definitions.translation: element in an oven that cooks food quickly by strong radiant heat

definitions.text: frittstående innretning med rist til å steke mat på over sterk varme (av kull, gass eller elektrisitet)
definitions.translation: freestanding device with a grate for cooking food over strong heat (from charcoal, gas, electricity)

definitions.text: spisested (eller rom i restaurant) der det blir servert matretter fra grill
definitions.translation: eatery (or room in a restaurant) where dishes from the grill are served

definitions.text: gitter framme på bil til luftkjøling
definitions.translation: grille at the front of a car for air cooling
